meaning: 吐鲁番[新疆维吾尔自治区](旧译Turfan)
examples: After 36 hours he had to Turpan.
Back in Turpan, we chose to visit a museum that featured one of the truly remarkable ancient works of civil engineering.
Other notable annual highs came from Queensland, Australia (156 degrees in 2003) and China's Turpan Basin (152 degrees in 2008).
